_comment: Built-in model pricing table for Aar cost estimation (all values in USD per 1 million tokens). Keys are matched as prefixes against the configured model name — longest prefix wins. Override or extend by placing a pricing.json in ~/.aar/ — entries there are merged on top of these defaults.
_cache_note: cache_write_per_million uses the 5-minute cache write rate (1.25x base input). cache_read_per_million is the cache hit/refresh rate (0.1x base input). OpenAI models use prompt caching; cache_write is 0 (no explicit write charge).

claude-opus-4._note: Claude Opus 4 / 4.1 — $15 input / $75 output. Prefix also matches 4.1 since that is more specific keys above handle 4.5 and 4.6.

claude-sonnet-4._note: Claude Sonnet 4 / 4.5 / 4.6 — all same price. Single prefix covers all minor versions.

claude-haiku-3-5._note: Claude Haiku 3.5 — still current (not deprecated). $0.80 input / $4 output.

_section_openai: ── OpenAI GPT-5.4 — current flagship family only ───────────────────────────

gpt-5.4-mini._note: GPT-5.4 mini — $0.75 input / $4.50 output (standard, short context)

gpt-5.4-nano._note: GPT-5.4 nano — $0.20 input / $1.25 output (standard, short context)

gpt-5.4-pro._note: GPT-5.4 pro — $30 input / $180 output (standard, short context). No prompt caching.

gpt-5.4._note: GPT-5.4 — $2.50 input / $15 output (standard, short context). Prefix also matches all gpt-5.4-* not listed above.

_section_gemma: ── Gemma (simulated) — Ollama runs locally for free ────────────────────────
_gemma_note: Fake prices used solely for cost-limit and threshold testing with config_gemma_cost_sim.json. Remove or zero-out all fields to restore the default $0.00 display for local models.
